title: oscore/edhoc: make Monocypher wipe dependency explicit
description: Why this exists: review of project-LICHEN-9nrr.17 found that OSCORE and EDHOC source files include monocypher.h and call crypto_wipe(), but their Kconfig options do not explicitly select or depend on LICHEN_CRYPTO_MONOCYPHER. Current tests/apps often enable Monocypher through link signatures or prj.conf, masking the dependency. What needs to be done: decide whether OSCORE/EDHOC should select LICHEN_CRYPTO_MONOCYPHER, move crypto_wipe into a smaller common wipe helper, or replace those call sites with a subsystem-local secure wipe. Verify OSCORE and EDHOC builds with and without link enabled. As a code-generation/fix Bead, run two review passes before closing.
close_reason: Fixed by making CONFIG_LICHEN_OSCORE select LICHEN_CRYPTO_MONOCYPHER and removing the oscore test's direct Monocypher enable so the dependency is proven by the subsystem. Verified qemu_x86 OSCORE unit build/run, OSCORE with link enabled, and EDHOC compile checks with and without link. Filed project-LICHEN-9nrr.27 for the unrelated EDHOC hkdf_expand warning found during verification.
